rep.name: Ryan Kimura
rep.preferred_channel: WhatsApp for logistics, email for anything with a dollar figure

standing_rule: No equipment invoice gets approved or paid without Brian Hall explicit approval. This file is coordination only. No PO release, no vendor commit, no financial commitment from this file. All price figures are quoted units from Ryan, not committed spend.

equipment.description: Force plate system for jump and single-leg testing
equipment.install_pad_ready: confirmed on baseline snapshot, verify at final walkthrough
equipment.training_requirement: on-site half day with Tom and Marcus
equipment.notes: Anchor asset for the return to sport testing playbook. Ties into the Notion protocol library.
Compact footprint, verify outlet placement near mounting.

equipment.install_pad_requirement: level sub-floor tolerance per AlterG install guide, wall protection specification
equipment.notes: Largest single equipment item and highest install complexity. Longest lead time risk.

equipment.power_requirement: standard 120V, UPS and surge protection recommended
equipment.notes: Software integration into the return to sport playbook and Airtable athlete caseload tracker.

approval_gate.policy: Anything at or above the threshold requires explicit Brian approval before execution. Ryan does not get a green light through this file, or through WhatsApp, or through Jira, or through Notion, or through any assistant channel. Approval is Brian only.

communication_boundary: Ryan gets scheduling and logistics through WhatsApp and email. No commit language, no PO language, no invoice acceptance language issued through any assistant channel without Brian sign off.
